regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-06-18. Equities at all-time highs (S&P +10 pct YTD, SPY ~750); semiconductors and AI names leading (NVDA, GOOGL up 14-15 pct YTD). Crypto in deepening Extreme Fear (F&G 15, down from 22 on 2026-06-17); BTC dominance 56.06 pct, total crypto mcap 2.29T USD (-0.82 pct 24h). 10Y Treasury 4.43-4.49 pct (elevated but stable). EUR/USD 1.1513 (soft USD, mildly supportive for risk assets). Fed FOMC June 17 projections revised: ~2 cuts expected H2 2026/early 2027 (later than previous forecast); PCE projected ~2.7 pct end-2026; ~30 pct probability of hike by Q1 2027. HOLD day — 0 trades. All 9 positions above invalidation levels, no guardrail breaches. Cash 13.3 pct NAV held as dry powder for risk-on flip (which would expand crypto sleeve from 20 pct to 35 pct cap). NAV 99505.26 USD (-1.61 pct from yesterday 101138.73 USD); pullback driven by broad equity/crypto weakness. Next catalysts: PCE data June 25, next FOMC Q3 2026.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta at $750.33 (~13.2 pct NAV). S&P at all-time highs (+10 pct YTD) with AI/semiconductor rally broadening. Diversified anchor under the growth-tilted mandate; participates in any continued risk-on leg.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed Fed re-pricing toward multiple hikes pushing SPY into a technical downtrend.

NVDA.thesis: AI/compute secular leader at $204.65 (-1.82 pct below $208.44 avgCost, ~14.3 pct NAV). Pullback within normal volatility; data-center revenue and hyperscaler capex still accelerating. Highest-conviction growth driver for the 33 pct CAGR target.
NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below ~150 USD.

MSFT.thesis: Quality AI/cloud compounder at $378.91 (-3.33 pct below $391.98 avgCost, ~14.5 pct NAV). Broad market rotation is pulling back quality names; cloud+AI thesis intact and FCF remains durable. Watching for recovery toward 390+.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality growth (search + cloud + AI) at $363.79 (-0.75 pct below $366.53 avgCost, ~14.4 pct NAV). Minor pullback; near-monopoly search funds AI optionality; resilient earnings in hawkish-rate tape.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Defensive value at $399.53 (-2.20 pct below $408.52 avgCost, ~5.9 pct NAV). Medical-cost and regulatory headwinds persist; retained as defensive ballast now that bonds are gone. Analyst targets 450-466 USD give upside.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

GLD.thesis: Tail/debasement hedge at $388.60 (above $386.54 avgCost, ~4.3 pct NAV). EUR/USD 1.1513 (soft USD) and central-bank buying still supportive; small size prevents drag on 33 pct CAGR target.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with a strong USD reversal; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader at $64,026 (-0.93 pct below $64,629 avgCost, ~14.4 pct NAV). F&G 15 (Extreme Fear, deepening) + BTC dominance 56.06 pct = strong contrarian accumulation setup. Held at 20 pct neutral-regime cap for the next risk-on expansion.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader at $1,742.44 (+4.47 pct above $1,667.47 avgCost, ~4.2 pct NAV). Historically low dominance (9.18 pct) = asymmetric upside when risk-on returns. Held within the 20 pct crypto sleeve.
ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: High-beta satellite at $71.44 (+5.35 pct above $67.81 avgCost, ~1.5 pct NAV). Small narrative optionality; first position to scale up when sleeve cap rises to 35 pct on a risk-on regime flip.
SOL.invalidationLevel: Break below 52 USD; network deterioration or sentiment collapse.
